title: Luxurious Flat Style Black 40" x 28" Picture Frame | MDF Wood Frame |(70 x 100 CM) Frame [ Black ]
features: Design: This Extra Large 70 cm x 100 cm Black poster frame is the perfect way to display your favorite movie, band, or any 700 x 1000 mm poster. It comes equipped with hanging hardware, allowing for easy, 40 x 28 Inch hassle-free display in both horizontal and vertical orientations, ensuring a flat and secure fit against the wall.

✅ Sleek & Modern Design: Our 700 x 1000 mm Black poster frame features a sleek, contemporary design that seamlessly fits into any décor style. Its minimalist look makes it a versatile addition to any room, whether it’s your living room, bedroom, or office. Modern poster frame - minimalist design, versatile.

Precise Dimensions for a Perfect Fit: The frame's inner dimensions size is 700 x 1000 mm, ideal for standard-sized posters, photos, or art prints. This is the maximum size of the artwork to be framed, with approximately 5mm of the edges remaining hidden by the frame for a secure fit.
THE PERFECT GIFT: Whether for friends, family, or colleagues, this frame makes a thoughtful gift. Showcase your favorite artwork or photographs in any room of your home or office.

Safely Packed: MND dealings frames are carefully packed with corner protectors and plastic film to ensure they arrive safely and in perfect condition. With our premium packaging, you can be confident that your frame will reach you intact. We also offer fast and professional customer service. If you’re not satisfied with your order for any reason, please don’t hesitate to contact us.Note: Please peel off the protective films from both sides of the Perspex sheet.
description: MND DEALINGS MODERN Flat Black PICTURE FRAMES - 70 cm x 100 cm / 40 Inch x 28 Inch PHOTO FRAME The MND Dealings is your premier destination for exceptional wall decor, offering an extensive range of designs to beautifully frame your treasured moments. Whether you're looking to enhance your home or office, we provide a variety of wall and tabletop frames, document frames, album frames, wall art, and more. Explore our exclusive collection and find the perfect frame to personalize your space today.
